hardware.gpu: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4070 Laptop GPU (8GB VRAM)

data_access.satellite_data: Google Earth Engine (GEE), freely accessible with academic registration
data_access.sentinel2: Copernicus Sentinel-2 L2A, 10m resolution, accessed via ee.ImageCollection('COPERNICUS/S2_SR_HARMONIZED')
data_access.sentinel1: Copernicus Sentinel-1 GRD, 10m resolution, accessed via ee.ImageCollection('COPERNICUS/S1_GRD')
data_access.gee_scripts: Provided in data/gee_download_script.js for exact reproduction of data exports

dataset_construction.spectral_bands: B2 (Blue), B3 (Green), B4 (Red), B8 (NIR), B11 (SWIR1), B12 (SWIR2)

class_taxonomy.Non-Urban (1): All non-built classes (vegetation, water, bare soil)

evaluation_protocol.statistical_validation: All key experiments repeated with 3 random seeds (42, 123, 7). Results reported as mean +/- std.
evaluation_protocol.significance_testing: Paired t-tests at alpha=0.05 across 3-seed OA values for model comparisons
evaluation_protocol.cross_city: Leave-One-City-Out (LOCO): train on 2 cities, test on held-out city, 3 folds per seed

improved_svm.features: 60-dim feature vector: 6 bands x 4 stats (mean, std, p25, p75) + 5 spectral indices (NDVI, NDBI, NDWI, SAVI, BSI) x 4 stats + 6 bands x 2 texture (h_diff, v_diff) + 4 band ratios

pillar4_forecasting.model: Bi-LSTM + Multi-Head Attention (2 heads) + MC Dropout
pillar4_forecasting.input_features: Urban area (sq km), Census population, GSDP, per capita income, Smart City allocations, metro rail length, NH density, SEZ count, FSI green cover, policy events
pillar4_forecasting.result: Standalone controlled benchmark: R2=0.9564, MAE=119.53 sq km, MAPE=6.66%

integrated_phase6_override.note: Harder operational setting using a calibrated temporal generator with real satellite overrides, tight urban-core boxes, and mixed-resolution temporal anchors

pillar5_alerts.regulatory_zones: 10 types (CRZ-I/II/III, Forest Reserve, Protected Forest, Wetland, Lake Buffer, River Floodplain, Green Belt, Western Ghats ESA)
pillar5_alerts.latency: 77.49ms mean per patch in the simulated alert stage of the integrated Phase 6 run
pillar5_alerts.throughput: 12.9 patches/sec in the simulated alert stage of the integrated Phase 6 run
pillar5_alerts.end_to_end_phase6_runtime: 26.0 minutes for the 21-file hybrid integration run
pillar5_alerts.integrated_output: Forecast-conditioned simulated output: 55 alerts, 4 CRITICAL, 11 protected-zone violations

code_availability: Full source code, GEE download scripts, training scripts, and configuration files will be made available on GitHub upon publication.
